'''Cira Larutur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Joz Larutur]] and one of the hostages taken during the [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Cira and Joz were on their way to see their first grandchild when they were taken hostage by [[Nuriin-Ar]] for the immediate withdrawal of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. During the hostage, Cira tried to calm her husband down when [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] negotiator [[Kaim]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]]. As [[Kal Skirata]], along with [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and a Special Security Officer of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] arrived and freed the hostages.
